name: Pineapple Dessert
recipeIngredient: 1 large can (20 oz) crushed pineapple, drained.
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the pineapple and sweetened condensed milk until thoroughly combined.
2. Fold in the Cool Whip until well mixed.
3. Add the lemon juice and fold in the chopped pecans.
4. Pour the mixture into two prepared graham cracker pie shells.
5. Chill for about 4 hours before serving.
